result:
CodeGraph 的 `imports` edge 與 grep 結果完全一致(70 筆),互相驗證。

**答案:70 個 `.c` 檔案**直接 `#include "server.h"`,皆在 `src/` 目錄下:

```
acl.c, aof.c, bio.c, bitops.c, blocked.c, call_reply.c, childinfo.c,
cluster.c, cluster_asm.c, cluster_legacy.c, commands.c, config.c,
connection.c, crc16.c, db.c, debug.c, defrag.c, entry.c, estore.c,
eval.c, evict.c, expire.c, fwtree.c, gcra.c, hotkeys.c, hyperloglog.c,
iothread.c, keymeta.c, latency.c, lazyfree.c, logreqres.c, lolwut.c,
lolwut5.c, lolwut6.c, lolwut8.c, memory_prefetch.c, module.c, multi.c,
networking.c, notify.c, object.c, pubsub.c, rdb.c, redis-check-aof.c,
redis-check-rdb.c, replication.c, resp_parser.c, rio.c, script.c,
script_lua.c, sentinel.c, server.c, slowlog.c, socket.c, sort.c,
sparkline.c, sparsearray.c, syncio.c, t_array.c, t_hash.c, t_list.c,
t_set.c, t_stream.c, t_string.c, t_zset.c, threads_mngr.c, timeout.c,
tls.c, tracking.c, unix.c
```

方法:先用 `grep -rl '#include "server.h"' --include="*.c"` 掃描全 repo 得到 70 個檔案,再用 `sqlite3 .codegraph/codegraph.db` 查詢 `edges` 表中 `kind='imports'` 且 target 為 `file:src/server.h`、source 為 `.c` 檔的邊,結果同樣是 70 筆且檔名列表完全對應,兩種方式互相驗證一致。
